text: Morning Jarvis, help me plan my day. What's on the calendar?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Sunday, July 28. No work meetings today. You have Ethan's soccer practice scheduled and working on the garage cabinetry.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Quick log: Soldering custom sensors in the garage. Scraping astrophotography files from Hubble. Lost track of time, it's 2 AM now.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: That is a clean implementation. Hubble raw FITS files are great. I'll track the download folder sync. Let me know if you want to run testing scripts.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Just wanted to mention that the kitchen sink area has a problem. I adjusted the automated lighting sensors to save energy. Need to keep the house in shape.
title: Household Update

text: Interesting. Good call on checking that. Smart move. I've updated the Jarvis automation dim rules after 9 PM. I can check local hardware store stock.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Cooking dinner for the kids tonight. We need to stock up on milk, coffee, and chicken. Looking forward to a good meal.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Interesting. Healthy choices are great. I've updated the Costco list and added diapers as we're running low. Should I check our pantry stock for that?
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Bedtime went very smoothly tonight. Ethan and Marcus Nguyen are playing in our backyard. Hope tomorrow is a bit easier.
title: Parenting Update

text: Screen time is always a negotiation. Playdates are great for Ethan. I can add snack shopping to the Target list. Let's keep tracking what works.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Quick update: We went to the Frisco Aquatic Center today. Lily's gymnastics class signup opens online tomorrow. Always coordinate calendars for these.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Interesting. Great progress. I've added the signup time to your alerts so you can secure a spot. Go Frisco FC!
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Hosted a game night at our place. Dave Nguyen invited us for a backyard BBQ. Always a fun neighborhood crowd.
title: Social Update

text: Interesting. I've noted the plans. Fun! Dave loves IPAs. I can recommend some local microbreweries. Let me know if you need any printouts.
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Just wanted to mention that setting my fantasy football lineup. Trying to unwind after a stressful day. Just taking it easy tonight.
title: Personal Update

text: Sure thing! I've adjusted the local settings. Reading is a great way to disconnect. I've set a quiet sleep timer. Let me know if you need anything else.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Reading scientific papers late tonight. I quantized a local LLM to run in memory. Lost track of time, it's 2 AM now.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Got it, Mike. I've indexed the research notes. Quantizing 70B models is heavy coding. I've saved settings in your scratchpad. Remember to get some sleep!
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Hey Jarvis, The lawn mower is having issues starting. The HVAC has been running constantly and upstairs is warm. Always something to fix.
title: Household Update

text: Logged that. Good call on checking that. A clogged HVAC filter reduces airflow. I'll note it on our maintenance log. I can check local hardware store stock.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Quick log: Cooking dinner for the kids tonight. We want to try a home-cooked chicken parmesan on Thursday. That should cover us for the week.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Logged that. Healthy choices are great. Recipe saved. I've added marinara and mozzarella to the grocery list. Enjoy the grilling tonight!
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Just wanted to mention that lily refused to eat her dinner today. We discussed positive discipline strategies for toddler tantrums. We need to stay consistent with them.
title: Parenting Update

text: Good planning. Consistency is key. Establishing clear, warm boundaries is highly effective. Parenting is definitely a journey.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Quick update: Ethan has soccer practice with Frisco FC today. Ethan is nervous about the soccer tournament in Plano. It's great to see them having fun.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Understood. Sounds exciting! Reassure him that practice is paying off. I've sent the game schedule to Sarah. I'll track the schedule.
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Planning a street block party soon. My golf driving was terrible but had a great catch-up. It is nice to unwind with friends.
title: Social Update

text: Sure thing! I've noted the plans. Jake is a great friend. Did you discuss the Naperville trip? Let me know if you need any printouts.
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Setting my fantasy football lineup. My starting running back is questionable. Just taking it easy tonight.
title: Personal Update

text: Logged that. Good way to wrap up the day. Injury report checked. Playing your backup is the safer option. I've saved the reading stats.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Time to log today's thoughts, Jarvis. Productive Saturday fixing things around the house. Had a great catch-up with the neighbors. Got some yard work done and cleaned up. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Logged that for you. See you in the morning, Mike.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
